2605.25786.title: NPSolver: Neural Poisson Solver with Iterative Physics Supervision
2605.25786.paper_summary: Efficiently solving Poisson equations on complex, irregular domains remains a fundamental challenge in scientific computing, as classical iterative solvers often suffer from prohibitive runtime due to ill-conditioned systems. While neural operators offer a fast alternative, they typically rely on large-scale labeled datasets or struggle with unstable training dynamics when using physics-informed residual losses. We propose \textsc{NPSolver}, a neural Poisson solver trained without solution labels via iterative physics supervision. Instead of relying on fully converged numerical solutions or raw PDE residuals, \textsc{NPSolver} utilizes a small number of preconditioned conjugate gradient (PCG) steps to refine its own predictions, providing a more stable and well-scaled training signal. Theoretical analysis confirms that this iterative supervision serves as a well-conditioned error proxy and that a stop-gradient design is essential for optimization stability. To better capture boundary-driven features under mixed boundary conditions, we further introduce the Boundary-Aware Transolver (\textsc{BA-Transolver}) architecture that explicitly separates interior and boundary tokenization. Extensive evaluations on 2D and 3D irregular geometries demonstrate that \textsc{NPSolver} outperforms both physics-informed and data-driven baselines. Furthermore, a downstream thermal control task highlights the model's capability for conducting efficient and reliable gradient-based boundary control. We will release our codes and data at https://github.com/intell-sci-comput/NPSolver.
2605.25786.paper_summary_zh: 有效解決複雜、不規則域上的泊松方程仍然是科學計算中的一個基本挑戰，因為傳統的迭代求解器常常因為病態系統而遭遇過長的運行時間。雖然神經算子提供了一種快速的替代方案，但它們通常依賴於大規模標記數據集，或在使用物理知識驅動的殘差損失時面臨不穩定的訓練動態。我們提出了\textsc{NPSolver}，這是一種通過迭代物理監督訓練而不依賴解標籤的神經泊松求解器。\textsc{NPSolver}不依賴於完全收斂的數值解或原始PDE殘差，而是利用少量預處理共軛梯度（PCG）步驟來精煉其自身的預測，提供更穩定且良好縮放的訓練信號。理論分析確認這種迭代監督作為良好條件的誤差代理，並且停止梯度設計對於優化穩定性至關重要。為了更好地捕捉在混合邊界條件下的邊界驅動特徵，我們進一步引入了邊界感知轉換器（\textsc{BA-Transolver}）架構，該架構明確區分了內部和邊界的標記化。在2D和3D不規則幾何上的廣泛評估表明，\textsc{NPSolver}的性能超過了物理知識驅動和數據驅動的基準。此外，下游熱控制任務突顯了該模型在進行高效且可靠的基於梯度的邊界控制方面的能力。我們將在https://github.com/intell-sci-comput/NPSolver上發布我們的代碼和數據。
2605.25786.author: Bocheng Zeng et.al.
2605.25786.authors: Bocheng Zeng, Rui Zhang, Runze Mao, Mengtao Yan, Xuan Bai, Yang Liu, Zhi X. Chen, Hao Sun
